ratings.comment: First semester teaching Marketing 310 and she was all over the place. So unclear about everything and lectures were unhelpful for the semester project. The project was rushed and unorganized. She was also a D1 hater and didn't help when you had questions.
Not very clear about grading or project criteria. Always has an attitude and quick to get annoyed when answering questions.
Extremely subjective and overall disorganized. Can be impatient and unclear when answering questions.
